device_name: Alphenix, INFX-8000V/B, INFX-8000V/S, V9.6 with aEvolve Imaging
intended_use: This device is a digital radiography/fluoroscopy system used in a diagnostic and interventional angiography configuration. The system is indicated for use in diagnostic and angiographic procedures for
intended_use_full: This device is a digital radiography/fluoroscopy system used in a diagnostic and interventional angiography configuration. The system is indicated for use in diagnostic and angiographic procedures for blood vessels in the heart, brain, abdomen and lower extremities. αEvolve Imaging is an imaging chain intended for adults, with Artificial Intelligence Denoising (AID) designed to reduce noise in real-time fluoroscopic images and signal enhancement algorithm, Multi Frequency Processing (MFP).
target_condition: Blood vessel imaging in the heart, brain, abdomen and lower extremities
ground_truth: Phantom imaging (anthropomorphic chest phantom) and comparison to predicate device (Super Noise Reduction Filter - SNRF)
other_metrics: Image quality metrics including: Change in Image Level, Noise and Structure (preserved mean image intensity, improved denoising, improved SSIM); Signal-to-Variance Ratio (SVR) and Signal-to-Noise Ratio (SNR) (improved signal preservation with decreased noise); Modulation Transfer Function (MTF) (improved low-to-mid frequency performance); Robustness to Detector Defects (detector defects remained visually obvious); Normalized Noise Power Spectrum (NNPS) (smaller noise magnitude in 0.1-1.4 cycles/mm range); Image Lag (reduced compared to raw and SNRF); Contrast-to-Noise Ratio (CNR) of low-contrast objects (significantly higher CNR with AID); Contrast-to-Noise Ratio of high-contrast objects (significantly higher vessel and guidewire CNR); Reader study (Wilcoxon signed rank test and Binomial test found AID significantly superior to SNRF for sharpness, contrast, confidence, noise, and absence of artifacts)
